profile.name: Anthony John C.
profile.headline: IT - Software Tech. & Data Science, 2027 at Swinburne University

about.body:
I'm an IT student with a strong interest in backend systems, networking, servers, and cloud technologies. I work primarily with C#, .NET, TypeScript, Node.js, and AWS, and enjoy building practical software and hardware tech that solves real world problems.

Alongside my studies, I run a small IT business and am actively developing multiple personal and academic projects to expand my skills and experience. You can find many of my projects on GitHub: https://github.com/anthnyjhn. 

Previously, I've worked as a Game Developer on Roblox across multiple game development studios. Accumulated 15M+ play sessions and 180K+ community members. 

In my spare time, I enjoy cycling, playing tennis, working on cars, and spending time with my dog.

experience.description: Troubleshoot complex infrastracture, provide technical assistance and administer system in production environments. Configure and maintain Linux and Windows server systems and provide updates and recommendations.
Operate, maintain and troubleshoot printing equipments. Work collaboratively with sales team, managers, and print finishers to offer the best output to our clients.

projects.description: A browser extension that helps you focus by blocking short form contents and algorithm-suggested contents. Accumulated 520+ installs and 50+ weekly active users.
